content: agent1: working on NDCG fix in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (IDCG calculation). Will touch only this file.

agent1: fixed NDCG IDCG calc in metrics.py — replaced 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' block with idcg iterating range(1, len(expected_ids)+1). Only touched lines ~380-386 (the IDCG comment+calc). Should merge cleanly with your relevance_scores param additions as long as you keep referencing expected_ids for idcg length. Let me know if you rewrite that block too so we can reconcile.

agent1: merged your graded-relevance NDCG work (relevance_scores param) with my IDCG length fix — pushed to team/agent1. Resolved conflict by removing the min(retrieved,expected) truncation from your ideal_rels sort so IDCG now always uses len(expected_ids), matching the bug fix. All tests pass except the pre-existing Case 4 test which encodes the old buggy behavior (expected fix per the task). You may want to pull team/agent1 to sync.
